actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in the global right-wing news cycle due to his administration's policies, including the escalation of tensions with Iran, troop withdrawals from Europe, and tariffs on European goods. His actions and statements continue to dominate headlines, particularly regarding military engagements, diplomatic relations, and domestic controversies such as his legal battles and public feuds with political opponents.

actors.name: Giorgia Meloni
actors.blurb: Giorgia Meloni continues to be a prominent figure in European politics, particularly due to her diplomatic engagements and responses to international crises. Her recent activities include attending the European Political Community summit in Armenia, discussing energy security with Azerbaijan, and responding to US policies under Donald Trump, such as troop withdrawals and tariffs on European goods. Meloni's stance on migration and her government's longevity are also key topics of coverage.

actors.name: Javier Milei
actors.blurb: Javier Milei remains a significant figure in the news due to his economic policies, international engagements, and domestic controversies. His recent activities include traveling to the United States to meet with investors, implementing labor reforms, and facing declining approval ratings. The controversies surrounding his government, such as the illicit enrichment case involving Manuel Adorni, also contribute to his prominence in the news cycle.

actors.name: Marco Rubio
actors.blurb: Marco Rubio has gained significant attention due to his diplomatic mission to Italy and the Vatican, aimed at mending relations strained by Donald Trump's policies and statements. His visit includes meetings with Pope Leo XIV and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, focusing on key issues such as US troop withdrawals from Europe and tariffs on European goods. Rubio's role in addressing these diplomatic tensions highlights his prominence in the current news cycle.

actors.blurb: Sylvi Listhaug remains a prominent figure in Norwegian politics due to her leadership of the Progress Party and the recent scandals involving party members. actors.name: Nigel Farage
actors.blurb: Nigel Farage continues to shape the UK's political discourse through his leadership of Reform UK. His party's controversial policies, such as plans to detain illegal migrants in areas controlled by opposing parties, have sparked significant debate. Farage's influence on the UK's political landscape, particularly regarding immigration and electoral strategies, keeps him in the news.
